faqs.question: How can I get into Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.
After 10th Diploma Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

placements.overview: Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur), is located in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. Established in 2008, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) provides 17 UG, PG and After 10th courses in 9 specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and After 10th Diploma are some of the courses offered at Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur). Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The total fee at Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) ranges between INR 70,000 to 1,60,000. Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) has a student intake of for all the courses. Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Priyadarshini Institute of Technology and Management (PITM, Guntur) courses range between INR 70,000 to 1,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very pretty and good, with well developed infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Students are pretty good and comfortable. The faculty are also good. 90% of students get placements without placement assurance. For mechanical students, MNCs and core companies offer placements. Companies that come for our branch are TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Infosys etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs have well-developed infrastructure, such as AutoCAD, workshop, CAD/CAM etc. Classrooms are very good, peaceful, and well designed, with smart classes and fans. We have a very good library with many books to read. We have the best hostel facilities ever, and they offer study rooms as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I am very dissatisfied with this college and I don't want any student to spoil their life here.

review_content.Placements: We got placements in BPOs in our academic year. 30% of the students got placed in those placements. The package offered was very low when we compare to regular ones. In our academic year, no one got an internship from our college. Our college is useless for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms were average. The library was good. We don't have any Wi-Fi or internet facility. They don't encourage sports and games, not only that, we don't have a proper canteen even. We don't have hostel facilities. The college is located between cotton yields, so it's very hot in our classroom.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges I have ever seen.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a very good placement cell in charge who gets as many companies as possible to bring placements into the college for its students and even keeps the offline drives. My seniors got placed in many MNCs in their final year itself. In my batch also, all of them got selected in many companies. I got selected in one of the best companies and working at present.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college contains the best in class infrastructure. The best labs, equipment for doing lab projects and every classroom consists projector as some topics are explained through PPT presentations. For games, all types of facilities and courts are present in the college. And, the hostel facilities are good. The food in the hostels is of the best quality. Our college has got the best infrastructure award in the year, 2013.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and good infrastructure to learn the subjects.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are nice placements like Wipro, TCS etc. The faculty of our college encourages us to participate because if you get the job or not first, we have to try, and it will be the experience to you. The highest salary is Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very well to develop our skills. There are nice labs to develop our skills, and we have lab facilities with the Wi-Fi connectivity, where you can bring your laptop and start your work in the surroundings of our college. I didn't face any infrastructure problems in my college life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: College is good but placements are not there.

review_content.Placements: 3-4 companies came to the campus but they were small companies only. One company named Kripa LED came for campus placements and some people got selected. The salary offered by them was 4 lakhs per annum. It is a good college but lacks in placements. I did an internship and there was no stipend for that, because it is a middle-range company and they are not giving a stipend to any of their people.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good and it is under construction for the fourth and fifth floors. The college had Wi-Fi, a library,and a clubroom. The classrooms are a little bit good and they are improving all the rooms and interiors for implementing ACs. The labs are also good in the college. The canteen is small but the food there is nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and management.

review_content.Placements: Sadly there were no placements during my MBA course. At the time of joining, the college management told me they had excellent and healthy relationships with companies, so our college students can get job placements very easily. To be frank, nowadays job placements have also become a kind of a business. I don't have any experience to describe it.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has a huge library. It was very helpful for my studies. My college has a play ground, but it's small and uncomfortable. During rainy seasons, it has some puddles. We did not have any medical facilities in our college days. Coming to the classrooms, classrooms were very dirty and they resemble an old building. My college has been operating since some years for earning money. The college management collected money from the students for freshers and farewell parties, but they did not conduct any parties during my MBA course.

review_summary.college_name: J K C College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Qualified lectures, good campus life.

content.Placements: The placements are offered by placement team and they conduct classes to enhance our communication and soft skills to crack the interview. College offer well practice of labs to perform well in interviews and placement team is well support to the students to get placement.
content.Infrastructure: Well furnished labs, classrooms and huge volume of library. Newly build canteen will maintained cricket ground, gym, indoor stadium volleyball court well playground and inside the college we have dispinsiry for medical and we also have Bank in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: We are absolutely satisfied with the faculty and the college premises. All are good.

content.Placements: More than 30 percent students are placed in my course. The highest package was 4 Lacs per annum and the lowest package was 1.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, tcs, Tech Mahindra, etc. Internships are offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have a cricket ground, basketball ground, football court, badminton court and also a table tennis court. We have the availability to play sports and participate in the tournaments. The food in the canteen is good and the classrooms and labs are very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a great opportunity to study in this historical college.

content.Placements: There were few placements in this college. Almost 50% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Wipro, IILM, Tech Mahindra, etc. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA. Interviews were also conducted in this college for better recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories were excellent. Classrooms were well-maintained. There was a library in this college. Digital classrooms were also available. The library remains open from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Telugu and English newspapers were also available in this college. Hostel was not available on our campus. Basketball and football courts were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, the college is wonderful.

content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in the course.  TCS, Wipro, IILM, Tech Mahindra, etc. are the top reruiters. Trainee is the top role offered. The highest package is INR 4 LPA, and the lowest is INR 2.4 LPA. 50% of the lower class got placed in college.
content.Infrastructure: In my course, there are labs, a classroom, and a library. They are all in good condition, and in the library, there will be English and Telugu news papers as well. The labs are also clean, neat, and have fast working systems. We don't have a hostel, and we have a canteen, and that food is good, and games are also there; we have volleyball courts, kabadi courts, basketball courts, and cricket grounds, and we have indoor games like table tennis, sheatil grounds, chess, etc. Medical conditions are also good at JKC College.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It's a great opportunity to study in such a historical college which. Has completed 50 glory years.

content.Placements: It's worth for this college having lot of placement companies will conduct interviews in the end of the 2nd and 3rd of the academic year. Many more frnds of mine get jobs in college placements. And I prefer our college for any one to get admission.
content.Infrastructure: In our college the infrastructure was well. And it has a play ground where Indian women's cricket team will once when we are studying our degree. And it has an auditorium where our management conducts programs and seminars given by our classmates.
